## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check one: -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature (minor version bump)
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix (patch version bump)
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `chore` — build, deps, config
- [ ] `breaking` — **breaking change** (major version bump)

## Checklist

- [ ] Issue linked (or description of need for unsolicited PR)
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] Tests added for new tools / hooks / behaviors
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] README.md updated if user-facing change
- [ ] Conventional commit messages used

## Breaking change?

<!-- If yes: describe migration path + bump major version in package.json. -->

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Concrete commands, URLs, or scenarios. -->
